reviews.title: Reserved for 2 nights but only could stay one.
reviews.text:
We reserved 2 rooms for 2 night but we bedding was used with hair all over the bed and in the bathroom. Absolutely nasty!  Not to mention the toilet get clogged and outside your room felt like an oven. No air condioner in the lobby or dinning area.  Need a refund for the 2nd we canceled right after checking in. Thanh you. 
Diann & Richard Isgro

reviews.title: They gave me the wrong room ...
reviews.text:
I booked a "Premium Deluxe King" room. Upon check-in,  I was giving a regular "Deluxe King" on the 16th floor. I didn't notice until later that night after multiple complaints to the staffs. The room I was given was recently cleansed using scented oil. It was quite unpleasant. I asked the staff to help and they told me to just open the window. I found that the sheets & comforters were wet. The staffs were quick to replace them with dried ones. later that night I noticed that the room was smaller than the room I stayed in the year before, so I looked up Muong Thanh's website and found that the room I was in was the regular Deluxe King. 

The staffs helped me move to the correct room on the same night to the 5th floor. The new room was much better, no odor. The next day I came back to the hotel and noticed a plate of fruits on the table, probably apology from the management. 

Based on what I had to go through, I'll probably won' stay at Muong Thanh Quang Nam the next time I'm in Tam Ky.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Sang,
Thank you very much for choosing our hotel and gave us  some our mistakes. First, we are very sorry because of inconvenience. We adjusted all your comments. Looking forward to serve you next time. Wishing you the best

reviews.title: Looks great on the surface, but...
reviews.text: The hotel looks great on the surface.  It is new, clean, and the staff is very pleasant.  But the mattresses are the same rock-hard mattresses one finds at the cheaper hotels in Vietnam.  The shower is uncomfortable to climb into, since there is a raised tub that one must climb over rather than a stall.  The drain for my shower kept closing up so that I was wading in water, and there is no curtain so water gets all over the bathroom floor.  The staff also mishandled my luggage, which I left at the front desk because I was checking in rather early.  It was shipped to Danang with the luggage of a departing group, and I had to wait several hours for it to be brought back on the next bus once they discovered this.  Apparently they don't have basic procedures in place for tagging and storing guest luggage.

The price of the room where we stayed was acceptable. The location of the hotel is good. The hotel itself is professional (they are probably the biggest in town). There was only one minus point which was the staff. They were not very friendly albeit professional. But this should not be something expected/acceptable as the local people where the hotel was built are known for their sincerity and friendliness. 

On top of that, the hotel has some other services in addition to accommodation such as event organizers, which makes it really noisy and uncomfortable. Unless those services are separated from the accommodation area, this was the very point which would prevent me from recommending the hotel.

reviews.title: Kind but unprofessional!
reviews.text:
First, thank you for the flower and decoration in the room for our anniversary. 
The hotel is clean and located in the center of Tam Ky. 
The swimming pool was big and nice to enjoy. All the drink was cheap and delicious. 
The staff was kind, but I felt like they were not really being trained. The way they acted is just impulse, unorganized and sometimes it makes us feel disrespectful. 
The restaurant had really good food and cheap price, but the buffet breakfast was a big no. 
I called the restaurant to order food many times and no one ever picked up. I had to call the receptionist to ask all the time. 
There was one girl with brown uniform and glasses working in the reception, I hope she will improve her English since she had no idea what my husband ( a foreigner) said without asking again. Therefore, no one did our request.
reviews.response:

Thank you for choosing Muong Thanh Grand Quang Nam hotel. Thank you for your reviews of the breakfast, facility and our staff.
Also we apologize for the problem you have encountered and promise that it will never happen again at our Hotels..
We constantly improve our services to best serve our customers
We hope to serve you the next time.
Have a good day!

reviews.title: Muong Thanh Quang Nam receptionists are awesome
reviews.text: We arrived at Muong Thanh Quang Nam at about 11:00 AM on 25/2/2026 and were welcomed with warm smiles from the receptionists. They gathered information from our booking and quickly assign room for us. At check out we also got all the help from these receptionists from watching our luggage and calling taxi for us and all the needed information that we need for traveling around town. After checking out and went home, I just found out that I have forgotten a shirt so I called the hotel and Nguyên was the one who answered the phone, she worked with house keeping and find out that my shirt is still there, then she worked with Lost and Found to keep it there for me until the next time I come back to Muong Thanh Quang Nam (my plan is to com back in the next couple weeks). I would give these receptionists a more than five star rating if I could!!!

Dobrý pokojový servis a jídlo z kuchyně za slušnou cenu v dobré kvalitě. Tím, že jsme byli mimo sezonu v hotelu většina věcí nefungovala. Snídaně průměr, nenadchne ani neurazí. reviews.negatives:
WiFi was absolutely useless - slow and kept dropping out. Had to revert to using phone.

Fridge only got things nearly cold - had to request ice from Reception.

Found the bed too hard.

Hot water was insufficient.

Staff struggled with English.

Very limited range of restaurants within walking distance.

reviews.title: Hài lòng
reviews.text:
Nếu có dịp quay lại Tam Kỳ, mình chắc chắn vẫn sẽ chọn Mường Thanh Grand Quảng Nam làm nơi lưu trú. Rất tiện lợi cho công việc của mình.

Khách sạn là một trong những điểm lưu trú 4 sao nổi bật tại Tam Kỳ với vị trí trung tâm và nhiều tiện ích như hồ bơi, spa, gym và nhà hàng.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Lời chào trân trọng từ khách sạn Mường Thanh Grand Quảng Nam,
Cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn Mường Thanh Grand Quảng Nam cho chuyến công tác của mình và dành thời gian chia sẻ những cảm nhận tích cực.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi khách sạn đã mang đến cho Quý khách sự thuận tiện trong công việc cũng như trải nghiệm lưu trú thoải mái với vị trí trung tâm cùng các tiện ích như hồ bơi, spa, phòng gym và nhà hàng.

Sự hài lòng và tin tưởng của Quý khách chính là động lực để đội ngũ chúng tôi không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ mỗi ngày. Hy vọng sẽ sớm được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại trong những dịp tiếp theo tại Tam Kỳ.

Trân trọng,
Giám đốc khách sạn - Cao Xuân Tiến

reviews.title: A wonderful stay !
reviews.text: From the moment I arrived, I was greeted with a wonderfully warm welcome in a truly grand reception area that set the tone for my stay. My room was well appointed, offering great city views from the 18th floor at the back of the hotel. The swimming pool was huge, and becoming perfectly shaded after about 4 pm, which made for a relaxing swim. Breakfast each morning was exceptional, with a mix of local delicacies and made to order eggs. A small issue arose late one evening, but Diem and Nguyen handled it with efficiency and care, leaving a lasting impression. I had a wonderful experience here.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Nic, 
Warmest greeting from Muong Thanh Quang Nam Hotel,

Thank you so much for your wonderful and detailed review!

We’re truly delighted to hear that your stay was such a memorable one—from the warm welcome upon arrival to the comfort of your room with its beautiful city views. It’s great to know you enjoyed the swimming pool, especially during the relaxing late afternoon hours, as well as our breakfast selection with both local specialties and freshly prepared dishes.

We especially appreciate your kind words about Diem and Nguyen. Your recognition of their care and efficiency means a lot, and we will be sure to share your compliments with them—they’ll be thrilled to know they made a positive impact on your stay.

It was our pleasure to host you, and we sincerely look forward to welcoming you back for another wonderful experience in the future!

Cao Xuan Tien - General Manager,

reviews.title: Muong Thanh Stay
reviews.text: Gia đình mình lựa chọn Mường Thanh Grand Quảng Nam để lưu trú trong thời gian tổ chức lễ cưới ở quê. Khách mời chủ yếu là người nước ngoài từ nhiều quốc gia, cả người lớn, người già và trẻ con. Các nhân viên, đặc biệt là chị Hương bên bộ phân Kinh doanh, người chăm sóc hỗ trợ trực tiếp cho gia đình rất nhiệt tình, chu đáo, nhanh chóng. Chị rất chủ động hỏi về các vấn đề cần để hỗ trợ gia đình. Gia đình mình cảm nhận được sự thân thiện, chuyên nghiệp và được quan tâm khi ở Mường Thanh. Sau này khi về quê thăm gia đình, vợ chồng mình sẽ tiếp tục lựa chọn Mường Thanh để lưu trú vì chất lượng dịch vụ 10/10.
reviews.response:
Quý khách thân mến, 
Lời chào trân trọng từ Mường Thanh Quảng Nam, 

Xin chân thành cảm ơn gia đình đã tin tưởng lựa chọn Muong Thanh Grand Quang Nam là nơi lưu trú trong dịp trọng đại vừa qua 💍

Chúng tôi vô cùng vinh dự khi được đồng hành cùng gia đình trong thời gian tổ chức lễ cưới, cũng như được đón tiếp các vị khách quốc tế ở nhiều độ tuổi khác nhau. Thật vui khi biết rằng mọi người đều cảm thấy thoải mái, hài lòng và được chăm sóc chu đáo trong suốt thời gian lưu trú.

Đặc biệt, xin cảm ơn gia đình đã dành những lời khen rất đẹp cho chị Hương – bộ phận Kinh doanh. Chúng tôi rất tự hào khi chị đã mang đến sự hỗ trợ tận tình, chủ động và chuyên nghiệp, góp phần giúp gia đình có một trải nghiệm trọn vẹn. Những ghi nhận của gia đình chắc chắn sẽ là nguồn động lực lớn đối với chị và toàn thể đội ngũ khách sạn.

Sự hài lòng và tin tưởng của gia đình chính là niềm vinh hạnh lớn nhất đối với chúng tôi. Rất mong sẽ tiếp tục được chào đón gia đình trong những lần về thăm quê sắp tới.

Kí

reviews.text:
Our stay at Muong Thanh Quang Nam Hotel was absolutely exceptional from start to finish. Everything exceeded our expectations — from the comfort of the room to the overall service quality and attention to detail.
The team delivered outstanding hospitality, always warm, professional, and genuinely caring. Every request was handled efficiently, making our stay smooth and truly enjoyable.
We would especially like to express our sincere thanks to Hương from the Sales team. She was incredibly attentive, supportive, and went the extra mile to ensure everything was perfect for us. Her dedication and professionalism truly stood out and made our experience even more memorable.
Without a doubt, this is a 10/10 experience. We highly recommend this hotel and look forward to returning again in the near future.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Joey, 
Thank you so much for your wonderful review and for choosing Muong Thanh Quang Nam Hotel for such a special occasion 💍

We are truly delighted to hear that your stay exceeded expectations and that you had a memorable experience from start to finish. Your kind words about our service, facilities, and especially the dedication of our team mean a great deal to all of us.

A special thank you for recognizing Ms. Hương from our Sales team. We are incredibly proud of her commitment and passion for delivering exceptional service, and your appreciation will surely motivate her even more.

It was our honor to be part of your wedding journey, and we sincerely hope to welcome you back for many more happy occasions in the future.

Wishing you a lifetime filled with love, happiness, and beautiful memories 💖
Cao Xuan Tien - General Manager

reviews.title: Khách sạn tốt nhất ở  Tam Kỳ - Chất lượng vượt chi phí bỏ ra
reviews.text:
Một trải nghiệm rất dễ chịu – Giá trị tuyệt vời so với mức giá

Mình chọn khách sạn này vì chỉ cách Nhà thi đấu tỉnh Quảng Nam 7 phút, nơi mẹ mình tham gia giải đấu bóng bàn dành cho người khuyết tật toàn quốc. 

Nhân viên – chị Hương, chị Ngọc và những người khác – thân thiện và nhiệt tình. Khi biết về tình trạng của mẹ mình, họ đã nâng cấp phòng mình lên  King Premium Deluxe - rộng rãi hơn nhiều phòng phổ thông, và thêm ghế trong phòng tắm để mẹ mình có thể tắm rửa thoải mái. 

Phòng mình ở tầng 14, rộng rãi, sạch sẽ và có view núi rất đẹp. Phòng tắm to, tủ quần áo rộng rãi, nhiều gương lớn. Nội thất màu sắc nhã nhặn, không gian yên tĩnh. Mỗi ngày đều có nước suối miễn phí. 

Bữa sáng buffet được bao gồm trong giá phòng và khá ổn. Bún phở không chất lắm nhưng trứng cuộn và hoa quả đã rất đầy đủ cho bữa sáng rồi. Thực đơn bữa tối có phần hạn chế nhưng món ăn ngon, khẩu phần vừa phải, giá cả hợp lý (160.000 – 330.000 VNĐ cho 2 người). 

Phòng gym sáng sủa, rộng, và có đủ thiết bị thiết yếu để tập luyện. 

Khu vực xung quanh có nhiều quán cà phê, nhà thuốc, nhà hàng và cửa hàng tiện lợi. So với các ks sạn khác ở Tam Kỳ thì đây là khách sạn tốt nhất – chất lượng rất hời so với chi phí bỏ ra.

reviews.title: A very pleasant experience - Great Value for The Price
reviews.text:
I chose this hotel because it’s only 7 minutes from Quang Nam Provincial Gymnasium, where my mom participated in a ping pong tournament for people with disabilities. We stayed for 1 week.

The staff—Huong, Ngoc, and others—were warm and accommodating. When they learned about my mom’s condition, they upgraded us to a King Premium Deluxe and added chairs in the bathroom to help her shower comfortably.

Our room on the 14th floor was spacious, clean, and had a stunning mountain view. The bathroom and closet were large, both with full mirrors. The peaceful atmosphere was a highlight. Daily bottled water was a nice touch.

The breakfast buffet was included and quite good. Dinner options were limited but tasty, with nice portions and prices (160k–330k VND).

The gym was bright and airy, with enough equipment for a solid workout. 

The area has coffee shops, pharmacies, restaurants, and convenience stores nearby.

This was my first time in Tam Ky, and I definitely recommend this hotel—great value for the price.

reviews.title: Oasis Near Train Station with Awesome Breakfast Buffet and 15 Minutes to The Sea
reviews.text: The staff is great here, especially at checkin. Don't hesitate to ask for the best available rate including taxes and service charges. Rooms are often available here for between $25 and $30 USD. Laundry service is impeccable and quick. Definitely worth the charges. The VIP Massage Spa include sauna in your private room. Local masseuse will be called for you. They are very accommodating to your needs. Check out the cocktail lounge on the roof. Great view. I have stayed here four times now. A great getaway from Danang and Hoi An by train or car. Top attractions nearby are the Memorial to Vietnam's Hero Mothers who sacrificed so much during The American War here. The Tam Thanh painted mural village by the sea is a pretty attraction best seen during high season, as many of the painted exhibits are pulled inside during the monsoons of low season.

reviews.title: Toujours Parfait . Un vrai 4 étoiles
reviews.text:
Hormis l’architecture extérieure du building qui est hideuse et fait penser aux constructions du temps de la Russie communiste , tout est parfait à l’intérieur .
La déco impersonnelle est reposante et fait qu’on pourrait se croire n’importe où sur terre . Cette chaîne d’hôtels est un peu le pendant des Hilton’s Américains mais à la sauce Vietnamienne . Je suis bon client de cette chaîne au Vietnam et n’ai jamais été déçu . 
Un Bémol , la très grande piscine extérieure pourrait avoir grand charme si elle était mise en valeur avec des arbres , fleurs et décoration . Car actuellement autour de la piscine on se croirait dans une petite caserne soviétique abandonnée .  Pas d’ombre , esplanade brute , sanitaires et bar à l’abandon .  
L, hôtel est à 15 minutes de route du joli village de pêcheurs de Tam Thành et en plein centre de la ville de Tam Ky .

reviews.text:
땀끼가 신도시라고 해서 궁금해서 갔는데 신도시 유망 도시였더라고요.... 그래서 주변 시설이 너무 열악했어요 ㅠ 점심은 주변 식당이 마땅한 곳이 없어서 롯데리아가고 저녁은 마트 식당 9시 전에는 다 닫고 룸서비스도 10시까지라 아슬 아슬하게 저녁을 먹었어요 ㅠㅠ 조식은 완전 별로.....  

그래도 룸서비스 까르보나라 진짜 정말 또 먹고 싶을 정도로 맛있었어요~ 

룸 컨디션은 넓고 좋았고 택시를 탔는데 땀끼에서 관광 명소인 어머니 동상, 벽화마을 알아서 안내주셔서 좋았어요~ 

주변에 외국인이 없어서 시선들을 한몸에 받았어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 호텔 금액은 저렴하지만 다낭에서 땀끼까지 오는 택시비가 더 나왔다는 사실.... ㅋ 

그랩도 안잡히고 택시만 가능하니 구글지도 키고 가면서 키로 금액 계산 하면 사기 안 당하니 땀기에서 그랩 잡을 생각하시면 안되어요~

 힘들기도 했지만 언제 이런 경험 해보나라는 긍정적인 마음으로 지내고 왔어요~
